Html:
I think there is a little bug in Application_Error function.If there is no InnerException available(value is null), a null reference exception will occur.

Please review this thread for details and the fix:
http://forums.asp.net/t/1580405.aspx

Thank you
Correct, I need to submit a patch to check the inner exception for null before trying to access it.
Just in case you did not find it yet,,, click on the "issue tracker" tab and that will help you.
